Class# BETextDocumentRequest

iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+tvOS 17.4+visionOS 1.1+

```
class BETextDocumentRequest
```

## [Topics](/documentation/browserenginekit/betextdocumentrequest#topics)

### [Instance Properties](/documentation/browserenginekit/betextdocumentrequest#Instance-Properties)

[`var granularityCount: Int`](/documentation/browserenginekit/betextdocumentrequest/granularitycount)Represents the scope of the request as a count of granularity units specified in `surroundingGranularity`[`var options: BETextDocumentRequest.Options`](/documentation/browserenginekit/betextdocumentrequest/options-swift.property)Represents the information that the system is requesting[`var surroundingGranularity: UITextGranularity`](/documentation/browserenginekit/betextdocumentrequest/surroundinggranularity)Represents the granularity units for the scope of the request## [Relationships](/documentation/browserenginekit/betextdocumentrequest#relationships)
